scripts.build:client:core: npm run build -w @school/client-ui && npm run build -w @school/common-ui && npm run build -w client
scripts.build:dashboard:core: npm run build -w @school/client-ui && npm run build -w @school/common-ui && npm run build --prefix dashboard
scripts.build:dashboard: npm install --include=optional --ignore-scripts=false --no-audit --no-fund && npm install --prefix dashboard --include=optional --ignore-scripts=false --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build:dashboard:core
